job_title: Senior Business Intelligence Analyst | The Points Guy
strengths: Strong SQL and advanced query experience
Hands-on Python + Pandas ETL and modeling
Experience with Snowflake/BigQuery and cloud storage
Quantified impact across projects and operations
weaknesses: No mention of Statsmodels or specific statistical libraries beyond basics
Limited tenure: ~3 years relevant experience borderline
Semantic layer authorship not explicitly stated
improvement_bullets: Architected and maintained the semantic layer for client performance reporting, ensuring consistent data definitions and metrics across Power BI dashboards and SQL-based ad-hoc analyses.

Performed advanced statistical analysis on loan portfolios using Python (Pandas, Statsmodels) to identify risk patterns, presenting actionable findings to non-technical stakeholders to drive revenue-focused strategy.

Collaborated with data engineering teams to enhance end-to-end data pipelines within cloud warehouse environments (Snowflake, BigQuery, and Redshift) to improve data reliability for downstream visualization.

Leveraged BI tools to translate complex, multi-step analytical results into compelling data stories, effectively presenting insights to cross-functional partners to inform high-impact business decisions.
Proactively identified performance trends and anomalies in full-funnel reporting, utilizing Looker-adjacent modeling techniques to improve measurement accuracy and provide clear business context.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Business Intelligence Analyst | The Points Guy opportunity with Red Ventures. I am interested in this opportunity because of the company's reputation for delivering seamless, data-driven digital experiences for consumers, and I am eager to contribute to the growth of The Points Guy. What interests me about working for Red Ventures is its innovative approach to digital growth and its commitment to fostering an inclusive, high-impact environment; this mission inspires me because it aligns with my passion for using data to solve complex, real-world business challenges. I believe my expertise in architecting robust data pipelines and my ability to translate technical findings into actionable stories would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on cross-functional alignment and operational efficiency. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in our reporting workflow; I developed an automated, end-to-end ETL pipeline and interactive dashboard system that replaced manual processes, ultimately reducing data processing time by 40% and increasing new customer acquisition by 300%. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Business Intelligence Analyst | The Points Guy role at Red Ventures would allow me to bring my advanced SQL and Python modeling skills to the foundation of your visualization ecosystem. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data warehousing and semantic modeling skills. I collaborated with underwriting and product teams to integrate disparate data sources from PostgreSQL into unified schemas, improving data accuracy by 30% and streamlining cross-departmental delivery. I am excited by the opportunity to use my data storytelling capabilities in working on full-funnel performance reporting at Red Ventures. I know that my analytical rigor and technical proficiency align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Business Intelligence Analyst | The Points Guy role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
